params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a flip-flop with Reset and Set features, capturing the D input on the falling edge of the clock signal (C). When the Reset (R) signal is high, the output RF is forced to HIGH. When the Set (S) signal is high, the output RF is set to the value of D. If both R and S are low, RF retains its previous state. The output RI is always the logical negation of RF, effectively providing an inverted version of the flip-flop output.
